language.label: Language
services.title: Services
tasks.title: Task events
taskHistory.title: Task history
taskHistory.empty: No saved tasks yet (run PDF OCR pipeline to create one)
error.noElectron: electronAPI is unavailable (open via Electron, not the browser alone).
error.stalePreload: Stale Electron preload. Close the app, run in frontend/electron: npm run build:preload && npm run build:main, then npm run dev again.

ocr.proxy.label: Proxy status
ocr.lang.label: OCR language
ocr.lang.hint: Applies to new tasks; resumed tasks keep their original language
ocr.lang.chDefaults: Chinese scan boost: {{mode}} · {{dpi}} DPI · denoise + NFKC
ocr.result.empty: Pick a page image to run POST /api/v1/ocr/process via Java backend
ocrRegion.title: Adjust OCR region
ocrRegion.hint: Drag the blue lines: gray areas are excluded from OCR. Headers/page numbers should sit in the bottom gray band. Footer position is auto-detected on preview.
